name: Chili and Meatballs W/Cornmeal Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 5 tsp Beef instant bouillon or 5 cups Beef Bouillon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine meat, onion, bread crumbs, egg, beef bouillon or beef broth, and chili powder; mix well.
2. Shape into 1-1/2 inch meatballs; roll in flour. Brown the meatballs; drain and set aside.
3. In the crockpot, combine remaining ingredients except beans and dumplings; stir in meatballs.
4. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours (high setting for 6 hours).
5. Stir in beans.
6. Prepare dumplings by combining biscuit mix, cornmeal, and milk in a medium bowl.
7. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto the chili; cover and cook on high setting for 45 to 60 minutes or until dumplings are cooked through.
